purpose: Safe metadata-only staging smoke-test payloads for the controlled-beta QA run prepared on 2026-06-29.

notAuthorizedFor: secret, token, cookie, magic-link, or account-detail capture
uploaded files, raw rows, prepared rows, prompts, model responses, reports, or exports

authenticatedFeedback.comment: Safe staging smoke test only. No operational data.

authenticatedTemplateCreate.title: Staging smoke template
authenticatedTemplateCreate.decisionQuestion: Which synthetic districts need review first?

authenticatedTemplatePatch.title: Staging smoke template updated
authenticatedTemplatePatch.description: Safe metadata-only staging smoke test update.

evidenceRecordingRules: Record route, method, status code, timestamp, and pass/fail only.
Do not paste response headers, cookies, local storage, bearer tokens, magic links, raw logs, raw DB rows, or personal account details.
For created objects, record only safe counts or an id prefix if the id is non-sensitive.
For screenshots, redact email addresses, account menus, tokens, URLs containing auth parameters, and database row details.
